song_name: Cant Live Without Your Love And Affection

pro_brother.song_name: Cant Live Without Your Love And Affection

content:
Nelson
Love and Affection
By: Tim Alley
hokies2000@gmail.com

Tune down 1/2 step


Intro: Riff 1 x2
Verses: Riff 1 Riff 2 Riff 3

After completing Riff 3 (mid-verse), repeat all 3 but do not play the open D note at the 
beginning of Riff 1

[tab]Riff 1
eb|---------------------|-----------------|
Bb|---3-2---2-3-2h3h2---|---------------2-|
Gb|-------------------2-|-----4-----4-----|
Db|-0-------------------|---0-----0-------|
Ab|-------0-------------|-2-----------0---|
Eb|---------------------|-------3---------|[/tab]


[tab]Riff 2
eb|---------------------|-----------------|
Bb|---3-2---2-3-2h3h2---|-----------------|
Gb|-------------------2-|-----4-----------|
Db|-0-------------------|---0---5---4-2---|
Ab|-------0-------------|-2---------------|
Eb|---------------------|-----------------|[/tab]


[tab]Riff 3
eb|---------------------|-----------------|-----------------|-------------------|
Bb|---3-2---2-3-2h3h2---|-----------------|-----------------|---2---3---2---3-3-|
Gb|-------------------2-|-----4-----4-----|---------0-------|---2---2---2---2-2-|
Db|-0-------------------|---0-----0-------|-----2-----2---2-|---2---2---2---2-0-|
Ab|-------0-------------|-2---------------|---2---2-----2---|-0-----------------|
Eb|---------------------|-------3-----3-2-|-0---------------|-------------------|[/tab]


Verse 1:
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Here she comes,  oh just like an angel[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Seems like forever that she's been on my mind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
But nothing has changed[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus[/ch]
She thinks I'm a waste of her time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
There she goes,  she don't know what she's missing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
Can't she see I'll never give up the fight[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus[/ch]
I'll do all I can till she understands my desire[/tab]


Pre-chorus:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I'm on the outside looking in[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Let me into your heart - oh -[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
There's nothing on earth that[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Should keep us apart[/tab]


Chorus 1:
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I can't live without your love and affection[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I can't face another night on my own[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
I'd give up my pride to save me from being alone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I can't live without your love[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Oh your love[/tab]


Chorus 2:
[tab][ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I can't live without your love and affection[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I can't face another night on my own[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
I'd give up my pride to save me from being alone[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]

Solo:
[ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]


Bridge:
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
For your love... I'd put my arms around you[/tab]

For your love... and find the strength to tell you
[tab]                                 [ch]Asus[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus[/ch]
For your love... No I can't live without your[/tab]


Repeat chords from Chorus 1 & fade out
